eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Logan, CO; at 03:22 PM ON FEB 25, 2026 Effective until 06:22 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Sterling Fire. Immediate evac from co rd 66 south to hwy 138 from hwy 113 to co rd 65. Leave now and head to Logan County Fairgrounds.
